item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
nice
as is tradition
i don't wanna mess with it at all
busted
older that that but yeah
it should
those are pretty good
or a 7 year old kid
it me you off them this everything everybody the world
right?
mmm hmm
improvise. adapt. overcome.
who else would it revolve around?
obviously
finally
not sure what vibe this is but i agree
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Hexia - Cosplay
item.description:
More Hexia cosplay! I can't get over how fun it was portraying the beautiful character that @miaormoa has created, and realized I still hadn't shared some of the many pics I took while cosplaying as her! Hope you all are having a lovely day!
Remember to always toss me ideas, I especially love doing any cosplays related to the imgur community, they are always so fun!
Reference image of the lovely Hexia :D
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: Absolute Lunacy Thursday Memes
item.description:
Or licking my own
Faptastic!
Just from the bags of poo I collect from unflushed toilets in public restrooms
Can never go wrong with eye to pizza contact!
Phrasing gone terribly wrong
Ah yeah! Hole sale at the DG!
Not my fault didn't want to play connect four
I hope you all are having a tip top week you beautiful Imgurians!
Scent of a Woman sequel is wilding!
Or even a hello back when I say hi
Gimme a hell yeah!!!!
The Resident Evil Village fantasy come true x2
Pop! Pop! -- Magnitude
Check these acorns out!
Hope you all have a great and safe rest the week and weekend!
The ultimate power play

item.title: Thursday Phone clearing dump (mostly GAMING memes)
item.description:
1. A WALK??? ARE YOU CRAZY?! PEOPLE DIE FROM THIS SHIT
2. Well, that's a good way to solve a riddle
3
4. When the other team sees me login in Siege (I'm a terrible player)
5
6. Bring back the purple, you cowards
7. Sorry for posting science fiction
8. Wrong door, motha fuckar
9. Imagine the script for GTA 6
10. But AAA companies sure are trying to
11. What game is this for your?
12
13. But like, casually
14.7
15. If you have nothing better to do on a Thursday day you can try the demo of my "Stanley Parable"-inspired game. I think the humor and the cold distant voice of the narrator will keep you good company ! Plus you get not to press a button! Can you imagine all the fun you can have not doing that? It's one for the ages! You can try on Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. It's a real game, I swear! (Pls wishlist uwu)
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: It's meme dump day .... Again... Vol 113
item.description:
Hello, it's Wednesday my dudes. Hope it's a good one for you.
I love nandor so much.
.
.
I'm fine with this
Yes.
Oh good.
.
.
.
I feel like some days it's all I think about all day. It's so hard to focus on anything else.
.
.
I'm fine
I had to save this for @vudumommajuju
.
I'll work on myself but I'm not trying to get more sane.
I like being a swamp witch, thank you.
Took you a while
Need
.
Have lived in various cities and there's always at least one
.
.
.
.
Oh noooo, Elmo.
I hate those fucking things.
All hail the raccoon demon God
Hans Christian Anderson books were all sad as fuck.
Always an adventure
Lol
Why is this so adorable
Fuck
Hahaha half my siblings still need to get on antidepressants so definitely not.
Lol
.
The WORST
Foolish mortal
I've never done Ayahuasca but this still made me laugh
.
I need to start doing this to my guy but I don't wanna ruin a good supply lol
I feel like this every day. Fuck chronic fatigue
This election year is an actual nightmare. I know you non Americans are probably sick of hearing about it but holy fuck.
.
.
I mean... Listen to your instincts I guess?
Stand off
He's getting so big and beefy. I posted a meme dump yesterday too for you who like to follow along: https://imgur.com/gallery/3wmOMG0
Happy Wednesday, my dudes. Toad friend says hello

item.title: Mephistopheles and Margaretta (A two-sided wooden sculpture carved by an unknown French artist, inspired by "Faust")
item.description:
Carved from a block of sycamore wood in the 19th century by an unknown artist, meant to depict the dicthomy of Good & Evil with characters from Johann Wolfgang von Goethe's 1808 play "Faust". The demon Mephistopheles and the innocent girl Gretchen (in other adaptations called Margaretta or Margaret), who was enslaved by the demon after Faust made a pact with him.
The sculpture now resides in the Salar Jung Museum in Hyderabad, India (after it was acquired by the former Prime Minister of Hyderabad Salar Jung I in 1876 during his travels in France.
item.dc:creator: Pasquinel

AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
This just keeps getting harder and harder
yes
I live in the country that invented it, fuck golf.
PISS WIZARD
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream (m/w/f around 1830 UK time) http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging

item.title: Schumer plans to strip Trump of immunity following SCOTUS ruling
item.description: Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer (D-N.Y.) announced Monday that he and other Senate Democrats will work to advance legislation to strip former President Trump of the immunity he was granted under a recent Supreme Court ruling protecting a president’s official acts from criminal prosecution. Schumer, invoking Congress’s powers to regulate the courts, said Democrats are working on legislation to classify Trump’s efforts to subvert the results of the 2020 election as “unofficial acts” so they do not merit immunity from criminal prosecution under the high court’s recent 6-3 decision. “They incorrectly declared that former President Trump enjoys broad immunity from criminal prosecution for actions he took while in office. They incorrectly declared that all future presidents are entitled to a breathtaking level of immunity so long as their conduct is ostensibly carried out in their official capacity as president,” Schumer said on the Senate floor. Schumer said the court’s conservative justices had “effectively placed a crown on Donald Trump’s head,” putting him above the law and making him “in many ways untouchable.” “I will work with my colleagues on legislation classifying Trump’s election subversion acts as unofficial acts not subject to immunity,” he announced. “We’re doing this because we believe that in America no president should be free to overturn an election against the will of the people, no matter what the conservative justices may believe.” https://thehill.com/homenews/senate/4760638-schumer-trump-immunity/
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin
